academicaudit.title: AI Academic Audit
academicaudit.subtitle: Academic Writing Pattern Analysis
academicaudit.tagline: Upload an Indonesian academic PDF to see probabilistic writing-pattern indicators. Not definitive AI vs human detection.
academicaudit.disclaimerBody: This analysis is probabilistic and meant to support evaluation of academic writing patterns. Results cannot prove whether text was written by AI or a human.
academicaudit.uploadHint: Drag and drop a PDF, or click to browse
academicaudit.optionsHint: Check sections to exclude from scoring. Nothing is excluded automatically without your choice.
academicaudit.processingHint: Extracting text, analyzing writing patterns, and building your PDF report…
academicaudit.truncated: Document truncated: only the opening paragraphs were analyzed (service limit).
academicaudit.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
